description: QuotedSourceRoot::semantically_eq(&self, other, Horizon{Full,Surface}) -> bool. Two-sided lockstep walk mirroring fingerprint_value across two heaps: atoms by rendered name, structs by schema name+arity, lists by spine, maps skipping __fz_span__/__fz_namespace_id__. Surface horizon additionally skips the value of any do keyword 2-tuple (uniformly drops fn+module+protocol bodies; each its own fact). Unit tests: identical=eq; span/ns differ=eq; literal differs=full-neq surface-eq; head/sig differs=neq; fast-fail. Independently testable; unblocks fingerprint kill.
title: Horizon comparator: quoted semantic walk (Full/Surface), fast-fail, no alloc
